title: shaphel #8213
definition:
1) to be or become low, sink, be humbled, be abased
    1a) (Qal) to be or become low
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to lay or bring low, humiliate
        1b2) to set in a lower place, show abasement
        1b3) to make low, sit down
